ayahEnglish: The likes of whom had never been created in the land?

ayahArabic: فَأَمَّا ٱلْإِنسٰنُ إِذَا مَا ٱبْتَلَىٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَأَكْرَمَهُۥ وَنَعَّمَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّىٓ أَكْرَمَنِ
ayahEnglish: And as for man, when his Lord tries him and [thus] is generous to him and favors him, he says, "My Lord has honored me."

targetTranslation: he tested him (acted on by رَبُّهُ)
ayahArabic: فَأَمَّا ٱلْإِنسٰنُ إِذَا مَا ٱبْتَلَىٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَأَكْرَمَهُۥ وَنَعَّمَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّىٓ أَكْرَمَنِ
ayahEnglish: And as for man, when his Lord tries him and [thus] is generous to him and favors him, he says, "My Lord has honored me."

ayahArabic: فَأَمَّا ٱلْإِنسٰنُ إِذَا مَا ٱبْتَلَىٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَأَكْرَمَهُۥ وَنَعَّمَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّىٓ أَكْرَمَنِ
ayahEnglish: And as for man, when his Lord tries him and [thus] is generous to him and favors him, he says, "My Lord has honored me."

ayahArabic: فَأَمَّا ٱلْإِنسٰنُ إِذَا مَا ٱبْتَلَىٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَأَكْرَمَهُۥ وَنَعَّمَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّىٓ أَكْرَمَنِ
ayahEnglish: And as for man, when his Lord tries him and [thus] is generous to him and favors him, he says, "My Lord has honored me."

ayahArabic: فَأَمَّا ٱلْإِنسٰنُ إِذَا مَا ٱبْتَلَىٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَأَكْرَمَهُۥ وَنَعَّمَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّىٓ أَكْرَمَنِ
ayahEnglish: And as for man, when his Lord tries him and [thus] is generous to him and favors him, he says, "My Lord has honored me."

targetTranslation: whenever (introducing the first part of the test mentioned in ٱبْتَلَىٰهُ)
ayahArabic: وَأَمَّآ إِذَا مَا ٱبْتَلَىٰهُ فَقَدَرَ عَلَيْهِ رِزْقَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّىٓ أَهٰنَنِ
ayahEnglish: But when He tries him and restricts his provision, he says, "My Lord has humiliated me."

ayahArabic: وَأَمَّآ إِذَا مَا ٱبْتَلَىٰهُ فَقَدَرَ عَلَيْهِ رِزْقَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّىٓ أَهٰنَنِ

ayahEnglish: But when He tries him and restricts his provision, he says, "My Lord has humiliated me."

ayahArabic: وَجِا۟ىٓءَ يَوْمَئِذٍۭ بِجَهَنَّمَ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَتَذَكَّرُ ٱلْإِنسٰنُ وَأَنَّىٰ لَهُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And brought [within view], that Day, is Hell - that Day, man will remember, but how [i.e., what good] to him will be the remembrance?

ayahArabic: وَجِا۟ىٓءَ يَوْمَئِذٍۭ بِجَهَنَّمَ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَتَذَكَّرُ ٱلْإِنسٰنُ وَأَنَّىٰ لَهُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And brought [within view], that Day, is Hell - that Day, man will remember, but how [i.e., what good] to him will be the remembrance?

ayahEnglish: And brought [within view], that Day, is Hell - that Day, man will remember, but how [i.e., what good] to him will be the remembrance?
